products.name: Blue
products.description: The verification substrate every MOBLUEHQ product runs on. A private inference mesh that returns sealed, signed results - the scheduler never sees your data, and every answer carries a receipt anyone can verify.
products.description_after: The rail underneath the portfolio: build once, every product rides it.

products.name: blueMoat
products.description: Prior-art screening you can defend. Paste a disclosure and get a screened landscape where every finding carries a validated source quote, an independent second opinion, and a tamper-evident receipt. Now running its judging on the Blue substrate. Built for founders, IP counsel, and diligence teams who need answers that hold up.

products.name: blueChart
products.description: Evidence packs for utilization review - criteria cited, sources quoted verbatim, dissent shown, every pack signed and offline-verifiable. No autonomous denials, by architecture. Private demo available on request.

products.name: blueGlu
products.description: The Blue chatbot for everyone. Works offline on your own device; online it draws on the whole mesh, shows where each answer came from, and flags when the AI is confidently wrong — the thing most chatbots will never tell you.
products.description_after: Private demo available on request. Buyer: anyone who wants AI that works anywhere and shows its work.

products.name: slumberNet
products.description: Donate your computer's idle time to the mesh. Install it, and when you're away your machine quietly helps run verified AI work - then gets out of the way the instant you return.
products.description_after: Private demo available on request. Buyer: anyone with a capable machine and idle hours.

products.name: blueCheck
products.description: Verification engine running: signed receipts, offline verification, council with judge-and-doer separation. Private demo available on request.
products.description_after: Buyer: engineering and compliance leaders shipping AI features.

products.name: blueSentinal
products.description: Catches AI at its most dangerous moment: confidently wrong.
products.description_after: Buyer: teams running AI inside decisions that matter.

products.name: blueProof
products.description: Prove what your model is. Turns a trained decision model into evidence regulators can read — built for filings, validations, and examinations. Buyer: chief actuaries and model risk leaders.

products.name: blueWitness
products.description: A second set of eyes for the AI you already use.

products.name: blueVeil
products.description: Keeps your private information private.

products.name: blueVault
products.description: Everything you know, found in seconds - nothing uploaded.

products.name: blueScope
products.description: Meeting notes for work the cloud is not allowed to hear.

products.name: blueTwin
products.description: An AI that is actually yours.

products.name: blueHand
products.description: Real work, done on your machine.

products.name: blueMuse
products.description: Your style. Your studio. Offline.

products.name: blueAnvil
products.description: AI for code that can never leave the building.

products.name: blueClaims
products.description: Faster claim closure with claim files that hold up. Multi-perspective evidence that resists tampering, every determination scored element-by-element and receipted for audit.

products.name: blueRelay
products.description: Verified AI infrastructure for regulated enterprises.

products.name: blueCredit
products.description: Lending models with examination-ready evidence, end to end.

products.name: blueFleet
products.description: Turn your organization's idle computers into a private verification region. Central policy, your hardware, your data - heavy AI work runs overnight on machines you already own.
products.description_after: Buyer: IT and operations leaders with fleets of underused machines.

products.name: blueLens
products.description: AI compliance oversight for regulated industries.

products.name: blueAssay
products.description: Quality verification for advanced manufacturing.

products.name: blueLedger
products.description: Verifiable computation for clinical research.

products.name: blueWatch
products.description: Verification for security operations teams.

products.name: blueDocket
products.description: Continuous prior-art watch for patent practices — the screening your team does by hand, running around the clock on every active matter.

products.name: blueScreen
products.description: Sanctions screening that justifies its own dispositions and drains the false-positive queue.

products.name: blueGuard
products.description: AML evidence packets — every decision arrives with the deliberation examiners want to see.

products.name: blueChorus
products.description: Collaboration infrastructure for regulated institutions.
